base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of cursor_indicator_arrow — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 dragon quest. Menu-cursor pointer arrow — indicates selected menu entry. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Menu-cursor pointer arrow — indicates selected menu entry; pixel-art variant for mobile
